reviews.text: Do not use these guys. Never reply to emails, never answer the phone, took months to get back to us or reply. Would book an appointment then not show up. Repainted roof and Paint is stripping off our roof already - they obviously didn’t prime it properly. Did not fix leak they were supposed to. Caused damage to the gutters. The sheer stress they caused is mindblowing. How they have so many good reviews is beyond me. Horrendous.

After a recent hailstorm, I was unfortunately scammed into having my roof replaced, even though I wasn’t convinced the damage was severe. I reached out to multiple roofing companies for a second opinion, and Weatherproof Restoration was the only one that responded.

Their customer service was excellent and very quick to reply. The estimator, Paul, arrived on time, was polite, and took the time to clearly explain what to look out for in the future. Although he couldn’t find any issues with the roof, I really appreciated his honesty and professionalism. I wouldn’t hesitate to contact Weatherproof Restoration again if I need my roof inspected or repaired in the future.

As another roofing company who has observed their work, I can confidently say that this business prides themselves on their above and beyond workmanship and professionalism. They are honest and dedicated to their customers, I’m impressed by the outstanding result they deliver on every single job. Best in the industry 👏🏽👏🏽

Really happy with our roof restoration and paint. Fair price, and a quality job by Mat. Great response and quick resolution to a minor concern we raised - sign of a quality, trustworthy business in my book. Can't recommend them highly enough.

Fabulous communication and service from Weatherproof Restorations.
From my first contact with them to my last contact they were very friendly, kept up communication, arrived when they said they would and completed the job with real professionalism.
Highly recommend them.

analysis.summary: Customers overwhelmingly praise the business for its honesty, professionalism, and clear communication, particularly valuing transparent assessments that avoid unnecessary upsells. A single severe complaint regarding poor workmanship and communication exists, but it appears to be an outlier against a backdrop of consistent high satisfaction.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: Weatherproof Restoration was the only one that responded... I really appreciated his honesty and professionalism.

analysis.owner_reply_observations: No owner replies are visible in the provided sample data. The absence of responses to the negative review is a potential risk, though the high volume of positive reviews currently masks this gap.
redesign_hooks: Feature Joe Lin's review prominently to counter 'scam' fears common in roofing by highlighting honest, no-upsell inspections.
Use Sam Pengelly's quote in a 'Why Choose Us' section to demonstrate proactive problem-solving and trustworthiness.
Highlight the peer endorsement from Elizabeth High to establish industry credibility and quality assurance.
